name: Sending code to boxes
info:
Switches message from music processing to a number representing color mode (using global.RGBmode)
If the switch is on the message will be pushed to that respective box

name: Switches and sliders
info:
If the switch is on the respective variable is set to true
Sliders send out their respective number through MQTT

name: Connection Status
info:
pushes whatever is in each boxes connection topic onto the dashboard 
(usually "Connected" or "disconnected")

name: Connection Status
info:
pushes whatever is in each boxes connection topic onto the dashboard 
(usually "Connected" or "disconnected")

name: Switches
info: If the switch is on the respective variable is set to true

name: Sending code to boxes
info:
Switches message from music processing to a number representing color mode (using global.ACmode)
If the switch is on the message will be pushed to that respective box
